purpose: Larger but cleaner dataset for food logging and custom recipe building.
source_note: This build cleans and restructures the user's existing datasets and preserves a USDA/Open Food Facts-ready schema. Exact USDA FDC IDs were not fabricated.
online_reference_sources: USDA FoodData Central for generic food composition data
Open Food Facts for barcode/product-label lookup
Official restaurant nutrition pages for chain restaurant items

removed_or_excluded.reason: Generated meal-prep combinations are better handled by the Custom Recipe Builder instead of being stored as thousands of near-repeated foods.

quality_rules_applied: Normalized serving text, including half/quarter/third fractions.
Removed exact duplicate food rows after serving and macro normalization.
Excluded generated meal-prep bowl combinations from app core data.
Kept base foods and enabled fraction calculations in the app rather than storing fraction rows as separate foods.
Separated recipe ingredients from general log foods, branded foods, and restaurant foods.
next_best_upgrade: Download USDA FoodData Central Foundation/SR Legacy/FNDDS JSON and map exact fdcId values for high-confidence nutrients.
